we are using an nginx container and by default it does not use the correct resolver (127.0.0.1). 
I followed the approach described here: https://serverfault.com/questions/876308/kubernetes-dns-resolver-in-nginx
Therefore I pass kube-dns by deployment env-variable and replace the nginx-conf like this
location @backend {
            resolver kube-dns.kube-system.svc.cluster.local;
                proxy_pass HTTPS://$sdnrserver:8443;
        }

In my tests it was not sufficient to use short names.
